title: Release v6.0 — 2026-02-01
text:
# Flowdesk Release v6.0 (2026-02-01)

## New
- Shipped **Global search across workspaces** in Search. This directly addresses top customer requests.
## Fixed
- Resolved Search performance issues affecting Enterprise accounts.
- Fixed webhook delivery reliability.

## Impact
Early data shows Search support tickets down after this release.
